title: Koun-chi 999 no Watashi, [Sokushi Mahou] ga Zettai ni Seikou Suru node Sekai Saikyou desu - Maryoku-chi 1 de Tsuihou Saremashita ga, Kakuritsu Cheat de Moriagaru ~
titleRomaji: Koun-chi 999 no Watashi, [Sokushi Mahou] ga Zettai ni Seikou Suru node Sekai Saikyou desu - Maryoku-chi 1 de Tsuihou Saremashita ga, Kakuritsu Cheat de Moriagaru ~
titleNative: 幸運値999の私、【即死魔法】が絶対に成功するので世界最強です～魔力値1で追放されましたが、確率チートで成り上がる
synopsis: Born into a prestigious family of magicians, Sachi faced despair when her magical power was assessed at a mere 1. In contrast, her luck stat was an astonishing 999, but to magicians, it was deemed worthless—?
searchTerms: Koun-chi 999 no Watashi, [Sokushi Mahou] ga Zettai ni Seikou Suru node Sekai Saikyou desu - Maryoku-chi 1 de Tsuihou Saremashita ga, Kakuritsu Cheat de Moriagaru ~

title: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu: Dai-5 Shou - Mizu no Machi to Eiyuu no Uta
titleRomaji: Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu: Dai-5 Shou - Mizu no Machi to Eiyuu no Uta
titleNative: Re:ゼロから始める異世界生活 第五章 水の都と英雄の詩
synopsis: The 5th arc of the Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu manga. Subaru and Emilia receive an invitation to a party from Anastasia and decide to go to Priestella, the city of the watergates.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.description: A character is stuck in a repetitive cycle that they are attempting to break out of. This is distinct from a manipulating time of their own choice.

tags.description: Prominently features time-traveling or other time-warping phenomena.

tags.description: Features a large cast of characters with (almost) equal screen time and importance to the plot.

tags.description: Partially or completely set in the Middle Ages or a Middle Ages-inspired setting. Commonly features elements such as European castles and knights.
